message:
fix: Avoid @ptrCast to non-allowzero types in all wasm memory access

wasm_load_u32 was casting [*]allowzero u8 to *const [4]u8 (non-allowzero)
for std.mem.readInt. LLVM traced the pointer back to @ptrFromInt(0),
stripped the allowzero annotation from the cast, and optimized the load
to return 0. This caused tag bytes to read correctly (via direct
allowzero indexing) but string header pointers to always read as 0.

Fix: all wasm_load_*/wasm_store_* now use byte-by-byte allowzero
indexing. No @ptrCast to non-allowzero types anywhere.
